epic.name: Project Infrastructure & Setup
epic.objective: Establish project structure, development environment, and containerized infrastructure for local development
epic.definition_of_done: Developer can run 'make dev' and have PostgreSQL, Redis, backend API, and frontend running locally in Docker

tasks.name: Initialize Go module and project structure
tasks.description: Create the monorepo directory structure as defined in claude.md with backend/, frontend/, docs/, deploy/ directories. Initialize go.mod for the backend.
acceptance_criteria: cmd/openincident/main.go exists with minimal main function
internal/ directories created: config/, api/, models/, services/, repository/, worker/

tasks.name: Create docker-compose.yml for development
tasks.description: Define Docker Compose configuration with PostgreSQL 15, Redis 7, and service definitions for api and web containers
acceptance_criteria: PostgreSQL service with persistent volume and health check
Redis service with persistent volume and health check
API service with hot reload capability and depends_on db/redis
.env.example file with all required variables documented

tasks.name: Create Makefile with development commands
tasks.description: Implement Makefile with common development commands as specified in claude.md
acceptance_criteria: make fmt - formats Go and TypeScript code

tasks.name: Create backend Dockerfile
tasks.description: Multi-stage Dockerfile for Go backend with development and production targets
acceptance_criteria: Development stage with air for hot reload
Production stage with minimal alpine image

tasks.name: Configure Go application with Gin framework
tasks.description: Set up Gin router with basic middleware (logging, recovery, CORS) and configuration loading from environment variables
acceptance_criteria: Gin router initialized with appropriate mode (debug/release)
CORS middleware configured for local development
Recovery middleware to prevent panics from crashing server
Configuration struct loads from environment variables with sensible defaults
